title: Add tk wrapper and worktree-mode agent boundary
description: Create .tickflow-bin/tk in each child worktree and prepend it to PATH. Allow read-only tk commands and block mutation commands with guidance to emit promise signals. Update worktree prompts so child agents never run tk close/update/note/create or edit .tick.
acceptance_criteria: In a worktree, tk close/update/note/create fail with a clear Tickflow message; tk show/list-style reads still work or proxy safely; child prompt does not ask agents to mutate tick state.
